subject: Hatsune Miku in a "Weekender Girl" costume variant — teal twintail anime figure in a yellow-and-teal outfit against a cosmic background
description: An anime figure with long teal twintail hair stands in a bright, energetic pose with one arm raised high, appearing to hold or display a small prop — possibly sunglasses. The outfit is vibrant, mixing yellow, teal, and white with bold color-blocking. Large, expressive eyes are a prominent feature. The background is dark and cosmic — stars and neon light trails in blue and teal suggest outer space or an electrified stage environment with a sci-fi inflection. The mood is bubbly and celebratory, evoking a pop-music performance.
foreground: anime figure with teal twintails, yellow and teal outfit, arm raised
